title: dicoma schimperi
intro: Dicoma schimperi, also known as the Horn of Heaven, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of East Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Dicoma schimperi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to alleviate various health conditions, including bronchitis and asthma.
